title: thelypodium integrifolium subsp. longicarpum
intro: Thelypodium integrifolium subsp. longicarpum, also known as a type of Thelypodium plant, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat urinary tract issues, due to its anthraquinone content. The health benefits of Thelypodium integrifolium subsp. longicarpum include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, reduce inflammation, and promote digestion. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the roots and leaves, then using them to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
